message:
fix(messaging): skip cursor delegation recording after partition conflict in ConsistencyChecker

When check_cursor_delegations() detected a partition conflict (two
holders claiming the same partition), it continued to insert entries
into partition_holders for the remaining partitions and then fell
through to record a normal cursor_delegations entry. This produced
both a conflict AND a healthy delegation for the same scope, making
the report contradictory.

Add a conflicted flag that skips the healthy-path recording after
any conflict is detected within a scope group. Tests updated to
assert the healthy entry is absent when conflicts exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
